statement: In every magma, Equation 2214 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (x * z)`) implies Equation 667 (`x = y * (x * ((x * x) * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0363
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op x z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op x x) y)))
